message:
fix(share): dual-driver snapshot for FrankenSQLite/C-SQLite compatibility

The SQL dump+restore in snapshot.rs had two issues:
1. SELECT * is not supported by FrankenSQLite - replaced with hardcoded
   column lists matching the known schema (projects, agents, messages,
   message_recipients, file_reservations, agent_links, products,
   product_project_links, project_sibling_suggestions).
2. Fixture databases (from Python conformance tests) are in C SQLite
   format which FrankenSQLite cannot read. Added dual-driver approach:
   try FrankenSQLite first (for runtime DBs), fall back to C SQLite
   (for fixtures/external DBs).

CLI changes: projects_included_from_snapshot() and restore verification
now use SqliteConnection since snapshots are always in C SQLite format.

Also fixes compilation errors from other agents' changes:
- queries.rs: Box::pin for recursive async release_reservations
- messaging.rs: move importance_val resolution after original is fetched
- disk_monitor.rs: replace u64::max() with if-else in const fn

3157 workspace tests pass (2 pre-existing server test failures unrelated).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
